ogTitle: Mulgrave vs Muli Muli: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mulgrave and Muli Muli.
heading: Mulgrave vs Muli Muli — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mulgrave, New South Wales and Muli Muli, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Muli Muli has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mulgrave (50/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mulgrave or Muli Muli safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mulgrave has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Muli Muli scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mulgrave scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Muli Muli scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mulgrave or Muli Muli?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Muli Muli has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
